P. gingivalis (Pg) extract-loaded coumarin-6-labelled NPs, either purified or non-purified, at different concentrations (0.25, 0.5 and 1.0 mg/mL) (mean ± S.D., n = 4).
Statistically significant differences between formulations are presented as: ****p〈 0.0001, ***p < 0.001, **p < 0.01, *p < 0.05, ns p〉 0.05.
